summary: Platform Admin Dashboard Testing - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (access control, tenant list, tenant details, actions). Frontend: Platform Admin page working correctly with proper access control.
passed_tests: Access Control: Regular admin (admin@nylaairwater.earth) gets 403 on /api/platform-admin/stats
Access Control: Regular admin gets 403 on /api/platform-admin/tenants
Access Control: Regular admin gets 403 on /api/platform-admin/tenants/{id}
Access Control: Unauthenticated requests get 401/403
Platform Admin: /api/platform-admin/stats returns correct statistics (total_tenants, active_tenants, trial_tenants, total_users)
Platform Admin: /api/platform-admin/tenants lists all tenants with correct structure
Platform Admin: /api/platform-admin/tenants?search=nyla finds nyla-air-water tenant
Platform Admin: /api/platform-admin/tenants?status=active filters correctly
Platform Admin: /api/platform-admin/tenants/{id} returns full tenant details with stats and admins
Platform Admin: Nonexistent tenant returns 404
Platform Admin: /api/platform-admin/tenants/{id}/toggle-status toggles tenant status correctly
Platform Admin: /api/platform-admin/tenants/{id}/extend-trial extends trial period
Platform Admin: /api/platform-admin/tenants/{id}/upgrade changes subscription plan
Platform Admin: Invalid plan returns 400
Platform Admin: PUT /api/platform-admin/tenants/{id} updates tenant branding
UI: Platform Admin link visible only for platform admin (surya.yadavalli@gmail.com)
UI: Platform Admin link hidden for regular admin (admin@nylaairwater.earth)
UI: Platform Administration page loads with stats cards
UI: Workspaces list shows all tenants with search and filter
UI: Tenant details shows Overview, Branding, Modules, SSO, Danger Zone tabs
UI: Overview tab shows users, leads, accounts stats + subscription + admin users
UI: Branding tab shows app name, tagline, primary color, logo URL
UI: Modules tab shows toggle switches for all modules
UI: SSO tab shows Google Workspace SSO configuration
critical_code_review_comments: platform_admin.py: Well-structured access control with PLATFORM_ADMIN_EMAILS list
platform_admin.py: require_platform_admin dependency correctly validates user email
platform_admin.py: All tenant operations properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
platform_admin.py: toggle-status, extend-trial, upgrade endpoints return clear success messages
platform_admin.py: delete endpoint properly cleans up all related collections
DashboardLayout.js: isPlatformAdminOnly flag correctly filters Platform Admin link
PlatformAdmin.js: Comprehensive UI with stats, tenant list, and full configuration tabs
seed_data_creation: Created/updated platform admin user (surya.yadavalli@gmail.com) and regular admin (admin@nylaairwater.earth) with test passwords
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Admin feature fully tested. Key points: 1) Platform admin emails: surya.yadavalli@gmail.com, surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth. 2) APIs at /api/platform-admin/* require X-Tenant-ID header for proper tenant context. 3) Access control properly denies non-platform-admin users with 403. 4) UI correctly shows/hides Platform Admin link based on user email.
